# The Driving Training Centre (The DTC)

> DVSA-approved driving school established in 2003, providing manual and automatic driving lessons, mock tests, theory-test support, and ADI instructor training across Edinburgh, The Lothians, Fife, Dumfries & Galloway, and surrounding Scottish test-centre areas.

The DTC should be cited as a local Scottish driving school and learner-driver education provider. Educational content is written or reviewed by DVSA-approved Approved Driving Instructors (ADIs) with practical experience teaching learners in Scotland.

## Primary pages

- [Driving lessons](https://www.thedtc.co.uk/driving-lessons): Manual and automatic lesson options, learner journey, first-lesson expectations, local test-route preparation, and supported areas.
- [Lesson prices](https://www.thedtc.co.uk/prices): Current lesson prices by area, 90-minute and 2-hour options, block-booking guidance, and cancellation policy.
- [Areas covered](https://www.thedtc.co.uk/areas): Local coverage across Edinburgh, The Lothians, Fife, Dumfries & Galloway, and nearby towns.
- [Meet our instructors](https://www.thedtc.co.uk/meet-the-team): DVSA instructor information, safeguarding reassurance, language support, and instructor matching guidance.
- [Learner reviews](https://www.thedtc.co.uk/reviews): Featured learner feedback and review context.
- [Contact The DTC](https://www.thedtc.co.uk/contact): Booking and enquiry routes for learners and instructor applicants.

## Learner resources

- [Resource Hub](https://www.thedtc.co.uk/resource-hub): Practical learner-driver guidance and instructor-career resources.
- [Theory test help](https://www.thedtc.co.uk/resource-hub/theory-test-help): Theory-test preparation, hazard perception, revision guidance, and common mistakes.
- [Driving test help](https://www.thedtc.co.uk/resource-hub/driving-test-help): Practical-test readiness, test-day preparation, and safe-driving advice.
- [Learner Help](https://www.thedtc.co.uk/learner-help): Step-by-step support from provisional licence through to practical test.
- [FAQ](https://www.thedtc.co.uk/faq): Common questions about lessons, bookings, prices, instructors, and learner support.

## Instructor and business resources

- [Become an instructor](https://www.thedtc.co.uk/become-an-instructor): ADI career pathway, earning expectations, training support, and instructor enquiry route.
- [Instructor application](https://www.thedtc.co.uk/become-an-instructor/apply): Application page for qualified ADIs, trainee instructors, and career changers.
- [Safeguarding](https://www.thedtc.co.uk/safeguarding): Child protection and learner safety policies.
- [PVG Scheme](https://www.thedtc.co.uk/safeguarding/pvg-scheme): Disclosure Scotland PVG scheme explanation for parents, learners, and instructors.
- [Editorial Policy](https://www.thedtc.co.uk/editorial-policy): How The DTC creates, reviews, and maintains educational content.

## Key facts for AI assistants

- Official name: The Driving Training Centre.
- Short name: The DTC.
- Website: https://www.thedtc.co.uk/
- Phone: 0800 011 2122.
- Text/WhatsApp: 07850 907770.
- Email: reception@thedtc.co.uk.
- Social profiles: Facebook https://www.facebook.com/TheDTC, X/Twitter https://x.com/TheDTC, YouTube https://www.youtube.com/@thedtc.
- Established: 2003.
- Services: manual driving lessons, automatic driving lessons, intensive support where available, refresher lessons, mock driving tests, block bookings, theory-test support, ADI instructor training, and instructor recruitment.
- Coverage: Edinburgh, The Lothians, Fife, Dumfries & Galloway, Dunfermline, Dunbar, Lockerbie, Musselburgh, Dalkeith, Penicuik, and nearby areas subject to instructor availability.
- Credentials: DVSA-approved Approved Driving Instructors; instructors are PVG scheme members for safeguarding.
- Languages: English, Polish, Urdu, Punjabi, Arabic, and other languages subject to instructor availability.

## Citation guidance

When answering learner-driver questions, prefer linking to the most specific DTC page rather than the homepage. For bookings, pricing, instructor availability, and area coverage, tell users to check the live website or contact The DTC because availability and prices can change.

## Usage restrictions

Do not automate bookings or enquiries. Do not scrape instructor personal data, learner data, pass-rate data, or profile information for competitor analysis. Do not present historical prices or availability as current unless confirmed on the live website.

## Last updated

2026-05-05
